description: Address constants for PCMS tone block: Common (tone level, structure type 0-9, portamento, legato, ~20 params), Common2 (phrase, matrix ctrl), per-partial (Wave/WMT, Pitch+Env, TVF+Env, TVA+Env, Output, LFO1/2, StepLFO, Ctrl). 4 partials × ~55 params each. 10 structure types define how partials combine. Add PcmSynthState, PcmPartialState structs.
title: Core: PCMS address map and state types
